Drivers for display, flash, STM32 microcontrollers, and functions for buttons, CRC, serial, GPIO, OTP, RTC, and watchdog.

## Folders
- **[display](display/README.md)**: Bitmap data and definitions for display images and driver implementation for the Sharp LS013B7DH01 display.
- **[flash](flash/README.md)**: Driver for SPI flash memory operations, including initialization, reading, and sanity checks.
- **[stm32_common](stm32_common/README.md)**: Drivers and functions for STM32 microcontrollers, including button, CRC, serial, GPIO, OTP, RTC, flash, and watchdog.

## Files
- **[button.h](button.h.md)**: Functions for initializing buttons, checking if a button is pressed, and getting button state bits.
- **[button_id.h](button_id.h.md)**: Defines button ID values for handling button input in the Pebble firmware.
- **[crc.h](crc.h.md)**: Functions to calculate CRC32 for byte streams and flash memory, not safe for ISR calls.
- **[dbgserial.h](dbgserial.h.md)**: Serial debugging functions for initialization, string output, and formatted printing in hexadecimal.
- **[display.h](display/README.md.h)**: Functions for initializing the display, showing boot splash, error codes, and firmware update progress.
- **[flash.h](flash/README.md.h)**: Functions for initializing, reading, and checking communication with a flash chip.
- **[gpio.h](gpio.h.md)**: Functions for using and releasing GPIO ports on STM32F2 microcontrollers.
- **[otp.h](otp.h.md)**: Defines OTP slot identifiers and functions to get and check lock status of OTP slots.
- **[periph_config.h](periph_config.h.md)**: Defines functions to enable or disable peripheral configurations using a clock command.
- **[rtc.h](rtc.h.md)**: Functions for initializing and controlling the RTC with options for fast and slow modes.
- **[system_flash.h](system_flash.h.md)**: Defines functions and constants for erasing and writing to flash memory with progress callbacks.
- **[watchdog.h](watchdog.h.md)**: Functions for initializing, starting, and checking the reset flag of a watchdog timer.
